description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build and coverage. The build job runs on ubuntu-20.04 with a matrix strategy across Python 3.7 to 3.12, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing dependencies, running tests with coverage, and uploading coverage artifacts. The coverage job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the build job, downloads coverage artifacts, combines and annotates coverage data, and reports coverage.
